name: Tryndamere
title: The Barbarian King
shortBio: - We were too scared of his rage to change him

skins.name: King Tryndamere
skins.description: A proud king who was once known only as a brutal highland swordsman, Tryndamere rules his people as the martial protector of two great Freljordian houses. Yet every day he resists the pull of an intangible evil at his back, as he has not forgotten a certain blood debt that he vowed to see repaid.

skins.name: Demonblade Tryndamere
skins.description: Tryndamere's cursed blade corrupted him from a once honorable barbarian into a rampaging monster. Now in a frenzy to sate his endless hunger, this demonic sword drives him to slay all. With each kill another fraction of his humanity is lost and succumbing further into the demonic sword's madness.

skins.name: Blood Moon Tryndamere

chromas.name: Blood Moon Tryndamere (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2020.

skins.description: The demon Tryndamere has fully assumed control over his twinned human body, using its inhuman strength to slash gaping wounds in the veil between the human and demonic realms. Shrugging off wounds considered fatal even to other demons, his is an unstoppable, unquenchable rage that would see all things consumed by the Blood Moon.

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2021 event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2021 event.

chromas.name: Nightbringer Tryndamere (Paragon)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as an exclusive drop from The Sanctum.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as an exclusive drop from The Sanctum.

skins.description: A fiendish god of rage and battle, Tryndamere embodies the moment when war descends into bloodied frenzy. Peace is anathema, but perhaps Yone's crusade presents an opportunity… After all, to Tryndamere, chaos is best when it is born of order's decay.

skins.description: Victorious Tryndamere was earned by players who accumulated enough split points in Ranked. The last thing Tryndamere's challengers would ever see was the unbridled wrath in his eyes as he decided they would be the next to meet his blade.

passive.name: Battle Fury
passive.description: Tryndamere gains bonus critical strike chance, increased by his missing Health.

spells.name: Bloodlust
spells.description: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, gaining Fury that increasing his Attack and Critical Strike Damage as he kills enemies and deals critical strikes. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Passive: Tryndamere thirsts for blood, gaining Fury every time he kills an enemy or deals a critical strike, giving him @ADPerStack@ Attack Damage and @CritDamagePerStack*100@% Critical Strike Damage per Fury.

Active: Tryndamere consumes his Fury, restoring @InitialHeal@, plus @HealPerFury@ Health per Fury consumed. (Max heal: @MaxHealTooltip@)@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Mocking Shout
spells.description: Tryndamere mocks nearby champions for their cowardice, reducing their Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Movement Speed reduced.
spells.dynamicDescription: Tryndamere mocks nearby champions for their cowardice, reducing their <physicalDamage>Attack Damage</physicalDamage> by @ADReduction*-1@ for @DebuffDuration@ seconds. Enemies with their backs turned are also <status>Slowed</status> by @SlowPotency*-100@%.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Spinning Slash
spells.description: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Tryndamere spins through his enemies, dealing @TotalDamage@ magic damage to enemies in his path.

Spinning Slash's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds whenever Tryndamere critically strikes.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Undying Rage
spells.description: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.
spells.dynamicDescription: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he becomes immune to death for @Duration@ seconds and gains @FuryGained@ <keywordMajor>Fury</keywordMajor>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
